query:
UPDATE dog_records dr
JOIN (
  SELECT dogId, photo2Url
  FROM release_plan_dogs
  WHERE photo2Url IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY addedAt DESC
) AS latest ON latest.dogId = dr.dogId
SET dr.photo2Url = latest.photo2Url
WHERE dr.photo2Url IS NULL;
